summary: Created missing spec file at specs/feat-12498-issue-11-add-testimonials-5-10.md based on project context and issue slug.
Added 7 new testimonial entries (testimonials 4–10) to all three locale files: src/i18n/es.ts, src/i18n/en.ts, src/i18n/zh.ts.

New testimonials cover clients from Colombia (Pablo Rodríguez), Brazil (Ana Lima, Fernanda Costa), Mexico (Carlos Méndez), Spain (David Martínez), Argentina (María González), and Germany (Thomas Weber).
Extended the testimonials array in src/components/Testimonials.astro with 7 new entries (indices 4–10), each using initials fallback (no photos).
The carousel now renders 10 testimonials with updated prev/next navigation and dot indicators automatically reflecting the new count.
No structural changes to TestimonialCard.astro, carousel JS, or any existing i18n keys.
astro build: 0 errors — 7 pages built successfully across all 3 locales (es, en, zh).
astro check: 0 errors, 0 warnings, 11 pre-existing hints (unchanged).

validation.lint: not applicable (Astro static site, no ESLint configured for this project)
validation.tests: no automated tests required per spec (static i18n content changes)
